# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

<article class="blog-post">
  <header class="blog-post__header">
    <h1 class="blog-post__title"><%= h(post.title) %></h1>
    <p class="blog-post__meta">
      By <%= h(post.author_name) %>
      <% if post.respond_to?(:published_at) && post.published_at.present? %>
        · <time datetime="<%= post.published_at.iso8601 %>"><%= l(post.published_at, format: :long) %></time>
      <% end %>
    </p>
  </header>

  <section class="blog-post__content">
    <%= sanitize(
      post.content,
      tags: %w[
        p br hr div span
        h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 h6
        strong b em i u s sub sup small mark
        blockquote pre code
        ul ol li dl dt dd
        a img figure figcaption
        table thead tbody tfoot tr th td
      ],
      attributes: %w[
        href src alt title class id rel target width height
      ]
    ) %>
  </section>
</article>
